thought.text: I will implement the `BookingScope` to filter bookings to the current user's bookings when accessed via the customer route group.

action.new_str:
def apply(relation)
      if defined?(RequestStore) && RequestStore.store[:rhino_route_group] == "customer"
        relation.where(user_id: user&.id)
      else
        relation
      end
    end
